name: libparallel-forkmanager-perl
title: libparallel-forkmanager-perl
summary: simple parallel processing fork manager for Perl
description:
simple parallel processing fork manager for Perl
Parallel::ForkManager Perl module is intended for use in operations that can
be done in parallel where the number of processes to be forked off should be
limited. Typical use is a downloader which will be retrieving
hundreds/thousands of files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libparallel-forkmanager-perl because simple parallel processing fork manager for Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libparallel-forkmanager-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libparallel-forkmanager-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libparallel-forkmanager-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
